title: The silhouette BETA
description: Brings paranormal activity into your world
body:
### ![promo art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2f920c9172ab8c74df6f1639d753c6ddb1094d2.png)## **Have you ever wanted to try to do ghost hunting? Now you can: **
###  

one day a little boy named Johnny gets bored with all these minecrafts mods then he finds this man in a dark alleyway, john talks to the man  "u got the mod?" the strange man in the top hat nods and gives him the usb with the mod. the boy gives him cash in return. the boy so excited to play "early access" to the new mod. 

As soon he gets home he's takes the usb out and starts playing when starting the game he got a warning "WARNING TAKE [REDACTED] OUT, IGNORING THIS MESSAGE WILL LEAD TO DANGEROUS EVENTS"
the subborn boy ignored it, then started the playing Minecraft "oh wow a new tnt mod?" said the boy. time passes and its late the boy starts getting tired while sleeping in minecraft he also slept irl. hes still sleeping ingame then a dark long hand crawls towatds the screen~~** the silhouette**~~ COMES OUT OF THE SCREEN without knowing the boy woke up "what was that ?" he heard a noise he started hearing scratching the bed frame the ~~**SILHOUETTE  **~~ like man comes up "it was the same man i met earier!" he thought then before he knows it the strange silhouette drags him into the screen. then seamlessly he was in the game irl everything looking so big. the boy is still processing what just happened?
looking down at his blocky hands

he looks up to see the room he built in game ~~**he sees him**~~ right to his face. he was on the ceiling, the boy was frozen in fear he didnt know what to do. the silhouette bites the kids head off...     everything is dark..   theres nothing... just a void  then he started to see things he saw his body decapitated. he freaked out putting his hands on his face...

He Is The Silhouette... 

every day now traveling through peoples servers searching for a player to swap his body desperate 
as if he thought maybe if he kills somebody the same way he was killed everything would be normal... never knowing he cant ***~~escape~~***.. he's in the twilight zone...

 NON DWELLER MOD

MEANT TO BE PLAYED IN FORESTS/TAIGAS (And non open areas)



 
 Sweaky: Models. Textures. Sounds. Animations 
 Notelekz : Coding. Animations (Runs and turn Only)
-=-=--===-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=
''Dont look at him straight in the eyes for to long..''
